info.name: SlimeDoesGamez API Collection
info.description: Complete API collection for SlimeDoesGamez Backend - Customer Registration with OTP Verification

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints for customer registration and OTP verification

request.description: Register a new customer account. Sends OTP to email for verification.

response.name: Success Response (201)
Error - Missing Fields (400)

request.description: Verify the 5-digit OTP sent to customer's email. Marks email as verified upon success.

response.name: Error - Expired OTP (400)
Error - Too Many Attempts (429)

request.description: Resend a new OTP to the customer's email if the previous one expired or was lost.

response.name: Success Response (200)

request.description: Login with verified email and password. Returns JWT token. For admin login, use the dedicated 'Login Admin' request.

response.name: Error - Email Not Verified (403)

request.description: Login as admin with default credentials (admin@example.com / Admin@123456). Token is automatically saved to {{adminToken}} variable.
Send password reset OTP to user's email. Email must be registered and verified.

response.name: Success Response (200)

request.description: Verify the 5-digit OTP code received for password reset.

response.name: Success Response (200)
Error - Too Many Attempts (429)

request.description: Reset password after OTP verification. Password must be at least 8 characters and both passwords must match. Make sure to verify OTP first via /verify-reset-otp endpoint.

response.name: Success Response (200)
Error - OTP Not Verified (400)
Error - Password Too Short (400)

item.name: Admin
item.description: Admin endpoints for managing services, categories, and subcategories

request.description:
Retrieve all services with pagination

Query parameters:
- page (number): Page number (default: 1, min: 1)
- limit (number): Records to return (default: 10, max: 100)
Retrieve a specific service by ID
Create a new service. REQUIRED: name. OPTIONAL: description. Slug is auto-generated from name.

response.name: Success Response (201)

request.description: Update an existing service. OPTIONAL: name, description. Provide only fields you want to update.

response.name: Success Response (200)

request.description: Delete a service
Retrieve all categories (with optional service filter)
Get categories for a specific service
Retrieve a specific category by ID
Create a new category under a service. REQUIRED: name, serviceId. OPTIONAL: description, parentId. Slug is auto-generated from name.

response.name: Success Response (201)
Error - Missing Required Fields (400)

request.description: Update an existing category. OPTIONAL: name, description. Provide only fields you want to update.

response.name: Success Response (200)

request.description: Delete a category (only if it has no products)
Retrieve all subcategories
Create a new subcategory under a category. REQUIRED: name, categoryId. OPTIONAL: description. Slug is auto-generated from name.

response.name: Success Response (201)
Error - Missing Required Fields (400)

request.description: Get all subcategories under a specific category
Retrieve a specific subcategory by ID
Update a subcategory. OPTIONAL: name, description. Provide only fields you want to update.

response.name: Success Response (200)

request.description: Delete a subcategory (only if it has no associated products)

item.name: Pricing Rules
item.description: Admin endpoints for managing platform pricing rules (shipping cost, customization fees, etc.)

request.description:
Get all pricing rules with pagination (public endpoint)

Query parameters:
- page (number): Page number (default: 1, min: 1)
- limit (number): Records to return (default: 10, max: 100)

response.name: Success Response (200)
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "rule-1",
      "name": "Shipping cost",
      "type": "FIXED",
      "value": "15.98",
      "description": "Shipping cost for all products",
      "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
      "updatedAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"
    },
    {
      "id": "rule-2",
      "name": "Customization Fee",
      "type": "FIXED",
      "value": "8.00",
      "description": "Additional fee for customization",
      "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
      "updatedAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"
    },
    {
      "id": "rule-3",
      "name": "Printing Fee",
      "type": "PERCENTAGE",
      "value": "15",
      "description": "Printing fee percentage",
      "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
      "updatedAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 10,
    "total": 3,
    "hasMore": false
  }
}

request.description: Get a single pricing rule by ID

response.name: Success Response (200)

request.description:
Create a new pricing rule (admin only)

Body parameters:
- name (string): Name of the pricing rule (must be unique)
- type (enum): FIXED or PERCENTAGE
- value (number): The amount or percentage value
- description (string, optional): Description of the rule

response.name: Success Response (201)

request.description: Update an existing pricing rule (admin only)

response.name: Success Response (200)

request.description: Delete a pricing rule (admin only)

item.name: Materials
item.description: Admin endpoints for managing platform materials (Apparel, Drinkware, Awards, etc.)

request.description:
Get all materials with pagination (public endpoint)

Query parameters:
- page (number): Page number (default: 1, min: 1)
- limit (number): Records to return (default: 10, max: 100)
Get materials by category ID (public endpoint)
Get a single material by ID

Create a new material (admin only)

Body parameters:
- name (string): Name of the material (must be unique)
- categoryId (string): ID of the category this material belongs to
Update an existing material (admin only)
Delete a material (admin only)

item.name: Printing Methods
item.description: Admin endpoints for managing printing methods (Screen Printing, DTG, Heat Transfer, etc.)

request.description:
Get all printing methods with pagination (public endpoint)

Query parameters:
- page (number): Page number (default: 1, min: 1)
- limit (number): Records to return (default: 10, max: 100)

response.name: Success Response (200)

request.description: Get a single printing method by ID

Create a new printing method (admin only)

Body parameters:
- name (string): Name of the printing method (must be unique)
- description (string, optional): Description of the printing method

response.name: Success Response (201)

request.description: Update an existing printing method (admin only)

response.name: Success Response (200)

request.description: Delete a printing method (admin only)

variable.description: Admin JWT token - automatically set after admin login
